nasb.text: “Wail, O Heshbon, for Ai has been destroyed! Cry out, O daughters of Rabbah, Gird yourselves with sackcloth and lament, And rush back and forth inside the walls; For Malcam will go into exile Together with his priests and his princes.

esv.text: “Wail, O Heshbon, for Ai is laid waste! Cry out, O daughters of Rabbah! Put on sackcloth, lament, and run to and fro among the hedges! For Milcom shall go into exile, with his priests and his officials.

cnv.text: “希實本哪，你要哀號！因為艾城已被毀滅。 拉巴的居民，你們要呼喊， 要腰束麻布，要哀哭， 要在城牆內跑來跑去。 因為米勒公，以及事奉它的祭司和領袖， 都必一同被擄去。

ccb.text: “希实本啊，哀哭吧！ 因为艾城毁灭了。 拉巴的居民啊，痛哭吧！ 披上麻衣悲伤地在城墙内跑来跑去吧！ 因为米勒公及其祭司和官长都要被掳走。
